_comment: Sample portfolio index seeded by install-projectindex.sh on a fresh student install. Lets find-related-repos.py return SOMETHING so the recon-before-new-project rule is followable on day one. Replace with a real generated manifest as your portfolio grows. Schema matches C:/ProjectIndex/agent-records/restart-manifest.json (records[] with name/path/workbook.title/restart.resumeSummary).

workbook.title: SGLT2i-HFpEF benchmark — full E156 demo: data → analysis → 156-word body → reproducibility audit

restart.resumeSummary: Worked example of the brainstorm → spec-lock → plan-lock → TDD → audit method. Pooled HR 0.81 vs published Vaduganathan 0.80, |Δ|=0.007 > 0.005 spec-locked threshold; shipped as honest-FAIL with full transparency rather than relaxing the criterion. The reference for how to ship a meta-analysis E156 paper end-to-end.

workbook.title: Reproduction-Floor Atlas: 14.3% non-reproducibility at |Δ|>0.005 across 7,545 Cochrane MAs

restart.resumeSummary: Pairwise70-scale (7,545 MAs / 595 reviews) reproduction-floor study. 21 pytest, Sentinel 0 BLOCK. Paired with cochrane-modern-re for the DL→REML+HKSJ+PI flip-rate companion. Primary E156-method-applied-at-portfolio-scale exemplar.

workbook.title: Responder Floor Atlas: empirical implied MIDs exceed canonical by 1.28- to 3.81-fold

restart.resumeSummary: Bootstrap-CI dashboard + cross-review overlap + log-normal sensitivity. 2013 trial-arm observations across 4 reviews. 102 tests; Sentinel 0 BLOCK. Demonstrates the spec-lock cycle: feasibility tag → amendment tag → results tag.

workbook.title: ImpossibleMA: Possibility Envelope primitive (k=1, missing SE, adversarial inputs)

restart.resumeSummary: 88 tests (66 engine + 22 UI). Demonstrates fail-closed extractor design + sentinel-string contract tests. 3 papers drafted (E156, F1000, BMJ Methods).

workbook.title: CT.gov Hiddenness Atlas: What Sponsors Still Do Not Show (578K-study audit)

restart.resumeSummary: Worked example of CT.gov v2 API querying + AACT bridge + honest framing of negative findings. Reference for trial-registry analyses.

workbook.title: The Fragility Atlas: Multiverse Analysis of 473 Cochrane Meta-Analyses Reveals 56% Are Sensitive to Analyst Choices

restart.resumeSummary: Multiverse analysis pipeline. The reference example for fragility-index work, sensitivity analysis at scale, and bootstrap-on-clustered-data.

workbook.title: Synthesis Courses — 26 interactive evidence-synthesis courses × 12 languages

restart.resumeSummary: Reference for HTML-app + i18n + interactive learning content. 335 files / 63.7 MB. Useful pattern for any teaching-oriented dashboard.
